name: MicroWars
author: Poki
description: MicroWars is a strategy game where you fight for the control of the map. Send your troops to bases to attack them and try to take control of them. Bases you control generate troops overtime, so the more bases you control, the more power you have. The maps contain various neutral bases. Are you ready to conquer faster than your enemy conquers you ? How to play MicroWars? Move the mouse cursor and drag a line from one base to another to send troops Who created MicroWars? MicroWars is created by Okashi Games. This is their first game on Poki ! How can I play MicroWars for free? You can play MicroWars for free on Poki. Can I play MicroWars on mobile devices and desktop? MicroWars can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
